reasoning-loop.description: Scan /Needs_Action, create Plans, apply Company Handbook rules, route to approval

hitl-approval.description: Execute approved actions from /Approved via MCP servers, log, move to /Done

ceo-briefing.description: Generate Monday Morning CEO Briefing with Odoo revenue data and task metrics

odoo-get-invoices.description: List invoices from Odoo accounting (filter by state, customer, date)

odoo-create-invoice.description: Create draft invoice in Odoo (requires human approval before posting)

odoo-get-balance.description: Get accounting balance: receivables, payables, net position

odoo-get-revenue.description: Get revenue report for date range from Odoo

send-email.description: Draft email → create approval file → send via Email MCP after approval

linkedin-poster.description: Generate LinkedIn post → approval → publish via LinkedIn API

facebook-poster.description: Generate Facebook post → approval → publish via Graph API

instagram-poster.description: Generate Instagram post (image required) → approval → publish

social-get-analytics.description: Get engagement analytics for Facebook and Instagram

facebook-get-comments.description: Get comments for a specific Facebook post

facebook-get-insights.description: Get Facebook Page insights and analytics (fans, engagement, reach)

facebook-delete-post.description: Delete a Facebook post (requires human approval)

error-recovery.description: Check system health, retry failed operations, manage quarantine

audit-report.description: Generate compliance reports from audit logs

facebook-status.description: Check Facebook/Instagram watcher status and health

schedule-task.description: Set up or manage Windows Task Scheduler / PM2 recurring jobs

weekly-audit.description: Run weekly business audit and generate reports

social-campaign.description: Create and schedule social media campaign for Facebook and Instagram
